findings.title: Target Unreachable
findings.description: Could not connect to the target URL for headers check.
findings.recommendation: Ensure target URL is correct and online.

findings.title: Missing HTTP-to-HTTPS Redirection
findings.description: The HTTP counterpart of the target URL does not redirect users automatically to the secure HTTPS version.
findings.recommendation: Configure the web server to automatically redirect all HTTP requests to HTTPS.

allFindings.title: Target Unreachable
allFindings.description: Could not connect to the target URL for headers check.
allFindings.recommendation: Ensure target URL is correct and online.

allFindings.title: Insecure HTTP Methods Disabled
allFindings.description: The tested HTTP methods (PUT, DELETE, TRACE, CONNECT, PATCH) are properly disabled or restricted.
allFindings.recommendation: Ensure web server configurations continue to block unsupported HTTP methods.

allFindings.title: Missing HTTP-to-HTTPS Redirection
allFindings.description: The HTTP counterpart of the target URL does not redirect users automatically to the secure HTTPS version.
allFindings.recommendation: Configure the web server to automatically redirect all HTTP requests to HTTPS.

allFindings.title: Sensitive Directories Protected
allFindings.description: None of the tested paths returned 200 or 403 status codes.

allFindings.title: Reflected XSS Checks Passed
allFindings.description: No unescaped reflection of scripting payloads was detected in the tested input fields.
allFindings.evidence: Probed parameters q, search, name, input with standard XSS script alert.
allFindings.recommendation: Ensure strict contextual output escaping is maintained.

allFindings.title: SQL Injection Checks Passed
allFindings.description: No database query errors or SQL syntax leaks were detected in response to dynamic probes.
allFindings.evidence: Probed parameters id, user, username, query, q, search, product with 4 SQL injection sequences.
allFindings.recommendation: Continue enforcing SQL parameterization across all query operations.

allFindings.title: Open Redirect Checks Passed
allFindings.description: No arbitrary redirection to external evil domains was detected during parameters probing.
allFindings.evidence: Tested 8 typical redirect parameters with external domain payload.

allFindings.title: CORS Security Check Passed
allFindings.description: No wildcard ACAO, origin echoing, or credentials leakage was detected.
allFindings.evidence: Tested normal request and requests with Origin header overrides.

allFindings.title: No Session Cookies Set
allFindings.description: The target endpoint did not issue any Set-Cookie headers in the audited response.
allFindings.recommendation: Ensure cookies continue to be avoided if session tokens are handled via custom headers.

allFindings.title: Server Banner Leaks Checked
allFindings.description: No Server or X-Powered-By information banners were detected in response headers.
allFindings.evidence: Headers Server and X-Powered-By are absent.
